text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I witnessed your heart-stopping race the other
day!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
You achieved a glorious victory over your rival! A
splendid performance! I hope you will continue to
ride this momentum!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Director Akikawa offers glowing praise after
<chrname> defeats a powerful
opponent! I'm even more motivated to do my
best!
